---
title: " Reasons why I am a Catholic and not a Roman Catholic. By the late Charlotte Mary Yonge. With a preface by G. M. Ireland Blackburne."
---

##  Reasons why I am a Catholic and not a Roman Catholic. By the late Charlotte Mary Yonge. With a preface by G. M. Ireland Blackburne.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1901
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology
**Format:** Pamphlet

**Publisher:** London: Wells Gardner, Darton & Co.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
